msg.confirmDeleteVertex:
Delete vertex "{{label}} #{{id}}"?

msg.confirmClear:
Clear ALL vertex data under "{{schema}}.{{label}}"?

This only deletes vertex data, not the vertex type or underlying table.

Type the label name "{{label}}" to confirm:
